title: LIFE-QUALITY OPTIMIZER
description: Life quality features + the best optimization mods
body:
**It does not support minecraft 1.21.1 (for now)**

A modpack that adds to the game a lot of life quality features including the best optimization mods.

**This is the list of the new life quality features:**

shaders support

cosmetics

socials

zoom

invite your friends into your singleplayer world

custom GUIs support

Custom entity textures support

Custom entity models support

Connected textures support


Dynamic lights support

shulkerboxtooltips

and voice chat support

**And now the list of the optimization ones:**

sodium the principal mod for the fps boost

sodium extra for extra settings like optifine

lithium for better server performance

spark another server optimizer

c2m engine for better chunk performance

entity culling for not render non visible entities

ebe for block entities performance

and 

nvidium for rendering more chunks (only with an nvidia graphics card)




I created this project for the pruporse to make minecraft better with more life quality features, with better frames that can make the game run smoth even in slow PCs and to make easy play with friends in your worlds without a server.

And that's the reason why I want you to download this modpack.

All the mods in this modpack are client-side but there are some mods like lithium and spark that does support the server-side also. If you will invite a friend in your world via the Essential world hosting he doesn't need this modpack to enter, he will only need the essential mod and is good to go. If you will put lithium in a server ther players will not need to have it in their mod folders. For more informations I invite you to reed the page of all the optimizaton mods.

Have fun :)
